data.description:
The "+ Add" button in the app header uses the default `size="lg"` height (`h-10`), while the ViewSwitcher tabs (Queues, Active, etc.) explicitly override their height to `h-8`. This makes the Add button visually larger than a selected tab, looking out of proportion.

Fix: apply the same `h-8` class to the Add button so it matches the action-bar tabs.
